expectedIssues: Top nav button is missing text
reportedIssues: The yellow rounded button in the top-right header appears blank, with no visible label or icon.
The “SCROLL DOWN” overlay overlaps the small legal/disclaimer text near the bottom of the promotional section, making part of the text unreadable.
The legal/disclaimer text is extremely small and low in readability, especially over the bright yellow background and with overlapping UI nearby.
The BetRivers logo card at the top of the hero appears clipped or tucked under the header, with only the lower rounded corners visible.

expected.reasoning: Reported issue 0 describes a button in the top-right header that appears blank with no visible label or icon, matching the expected defect of a top nav button missing text.
